Package HWSystem.Devices

Class TempSensor

  • java.lang.Object
    • HWSystem.Devices.Device
      • HWSystem.Devices.Sensor
        • HWSystem.Devices.TempSensor
  • Direct Known Subclasses:
    BME280, DHT11
    public abstract class TempSensor
extends Sensor
    Abstract TempSensor class Represents temperature sensors in the system
